Niharika wholesale discovery with Nina

Let Nina understand the buyer before Niharika quotes.

Niharika is now a wholesale business tool powered by Nina. Nina talks to buyers, captures product needs, quantity, budget, delivery city, and routes qualified enquiries.

Share Customer Link Customer Google Login Wholesale Survey Business Access Wholesale Products
Talk with Nina

Nina collects wholesale requirements before sales follow-up.

Buyers can explain what they need in plain language. Nina turns that into requirement signals so Niharika can respond with the right product, quantity, quote, and next step.

WhatsApp Business Instagram @niharika_kurtis
Nina Niharika wholesale assistant
Requirement mode
Hi, I am Nina for Niharika. Tell me what product you need, quantity, budget, and delivery city.

Niharika Catalogue Pieces

Customers can browse available pieces, choose an item, and send the requirement directly to Nina.
